name: Desertfest Oslo Pre-Party // L.A Witch | 10.000 Years | 1234!
description:
🔥Brewgata Presents: Desertfest Oslo Pre-Party 2026🔥

Brewgata teams up with Desertfest for this special festival kick off pre-party🤘

LIVE ON STAGE:

L.A. Witch (US)
The mesmerizing garage rock trio from Los Angeles CA blends hazy psych-folk, lo-fi blues, and reverb-soaked surf.

10.000 Years (SE)
Sweden’s crushing stoner metal trio returns to Brewgata with massive riffs and heavy energy.

1234! (NO)
A fierce Norwegian bass and drums duo bringing raw power and noise. In support of their album “Kill It With Fire!”, they’re ready to turn it all the way up.

⚡️Very limited tickets available! Don’t miss your chance to start the festival with a bang!

Age Limit 20
